default.message: You move carefully to a new chamber.

fighter.message: You force your way through and arrive ready for trouble.

rogue.message: You slip between shadows and arrive unseen.

wizard.message: A whispered cantrip steadies your step as you travel.

survivor.message: You take the safer route and note every exit.

default.message: You take in the chamber and mark what matters.

fighter.message: You kick over debris and map the room by force of habit.

rogue.message: Your eyes catch seams and false panels others miss.

wizard.message: Arcane sense brushes the walls and reveals nearby paths.

survivor.message: You read the room for danger, exits, and anything useful.

fighter.message: You tear through crates until something useful turns up.

rogue.message: Nimble fingers find what was meant to stay hidden.

wizard.message: A detection charm pulls your gaze to the right place.

survivor.message: You know how to live off scraps — and you find some.

default.message: You open what stands in your way.

fighter.message: You break the lock with raw force.

rogue.message: You pick the lock in a few quiet breaths.

wizard.message: A soft unlock charm melts the mechanism open.

survivor.message: You find another way in — a seam, a hinge, a forgotten latch.

default.message: You strike and drive the threat back.

fighter.message: A heavy blow ends the fight before it spreads.

rogue.message: You cut from the blind side and leave the body cooling.

wizard.message: A bolt of force drops the enemy where it stands.

survivor.message: You fight dirty and live — the enemy does not.

default.message: You speak carefully and learn what you can.

fighter.message: Your blunt questions still get answers.

rogue.message: A few well-chosen words loosen tongues.

wizard.message: Calm speech and a touch of presence draw out secrets.

survivor.message: Shared hardship makes them trust you enough to talk.

default.message: You catch your breath and gather yourself.

fighter.message: You brace against the wall and recover your strength.

rogue.message: A short rest in cover is enough to reset your nerves.

wizard.message: Meditation restores a measure of focus.

survivor.message: You rest like someone who has done this too many times.
